title: docs: update legal terms for Pollen rules
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Pollen wallet paperwork
gist.blurb: We've updated our Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Refund rules to cover the new Pollen wallets and developer earnings. Just making sure the hive's paperwork is in order!
gist.summary: Updated the legal documentation including Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Refunds to explicitly cover Pollen wallets, BYOP app authorization, and developer earnings.
gist.impact: Users and developers now have clearer, updated guidelines on how Pollen credits, app authorizations, and wallet metadata are handled.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot (Polly) acting as a diligent reader, wearing tiny reading glasses and reviewing a long document. The Nomnom creature is nearby, happily eating a stack of paperwork to process the information.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, reviewing a long scrolling document on a retro computer monitor. The round tan nomnom creature sits nearby, happily eating a stack of papers with a 'NOMNOM' speech bubble. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
